item.title: A Pot Found While Mudlarking
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares the story behind a pot found while mudlarking. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A Pot Found While Mudlarking
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares the story behind a pot found while mudlarking. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Pottery Pieces on the Beach
item.description: Exploring a beach scattered with pottery pieces and what they can reveal about the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Close-Call Find on the Thames Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and reflects on a find nearly missed at low tide. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
